kirundi.review_your_mission_objectives_and_cre: Suzuma intego z'ubutumwa bwawe n'igenwa ry'abakozi
kirundi.countdown_and_liftoff_from_kennedy_spa: Kubara hasi no kuguruka biva muri Kennedy Space Center
kirundi.reach_low_earth_orbit_and_prepare_for_: Gera ku ruziga rw'Isi rwo hasi maze witegure Trans-Lunar Injection
kirundi.explore_the_lunar_surface_and_collect_: Shakashaka ku buso bw'ukwezi maze ukusanye ingero
kirundi.launch_from_the_moon_and_rendezvous_wi: Guruka uva ku Kwezi maze uhure na module y'amategeko
kirundi.re_entry_splashdown: Kongera Kwinjira no Kumanuka mu Mazi
kirundi.survive_re_entry_and_splash_down_in_th: Rokoka kongera kwinjira maze umanuke mu Nyanja ya Pasifika
kirundi.pilots_the_lunar_module_to_the_surface: Ayobora module y'ukwezi ku buso kandi ayobora EVA
kirundi.orbits_the_moon_alone_in_the_command_m: Azenguruka Ukwezi wenyine muri module y'amategeko mu gihe CDR na LMP bashakashaka
kirundi.assists_with_descent_and_eva_operates_: Afasha mu kumanuka na EVA, akoresha ibikoresho bya siyansi
kirundi.this_ancient_rock_from_the_lunar_highl: Iyi rutare ya kera iva mu misozi miremire y'ukwezi ifite imyaka miliyari 4.4 — hafi ya kera nk'Ukwezi ubwako. Iratubwira ko Ukwezi kwahoze gufite inyanja ya magma y'isi yose.
kirundi.dark_volcanic_basalt_filled_the_moon_s: Basalt y'ibirunga yijimye yuzuye ibibaya binini by'ingaruka by'Ukwezi maze ikora «inyanja» zijimye (maria) zigaragara ziva ku Isi. Iyi lava yaturikiye mu myaka miliyari 3-3.5 ishize.
kirundi.a_jumbled_mix_of_rock_fragments_welded: Ivanze ridasanzwe ry'uduce tw'urutare twahujwe hamwe n'ingaruka za meteorite. Ubuso bw'Ukwezi bwakubiswe mu myaka irenga miliyari 4.
kirundi.lunar_soil_is_ground_up_rock_from_bill: Ubutaka bw'ukwezi ni urutare rwasekuwe ruva mu myaka miliyari z'ibitero by'udukomeza twa meteorite. Bufite n'ubuhumyi buto bw'ikirahuri n'ibimenyetso by'uduce tw'umuyaga w'izuba.
kirundi.apollo_17_found_orange_soil_tiny_glass: Apollo 17 yabonye ubutaka bw'icunga — ubuhumyi buto bw'ikirahuri buva mu kuturika kw'ikirunga cya kera mu myaka miliyari 3.7 ishize. Ni kimwe mu byavumbuwe bishimishije cyane bya Apollo!
kirundi.kreep_stands_for_potassium_k_rare_eart: KREEP isobanura Potassium (K), Rare Earth Elements, na Phosphorus (P). Iyi mabuye y'agaciro yakoraniye mu bisigazwa bya nyuma by'inyanja ya magma y'ukwezi.
kirundi.meteorite_impacts_melt_rock_into_glass: Ingaruka za meteorite zishongesha urutare zikaba ikirahuri, kiguruka mu kirere kikamanuka nk'uduhimba duto. Bimwe bifite gaze zafashwe ziva mu kirere cya kera cy'ukwezi.
kirundi.apollo_15_found_this_4_1_billion_year_: Apollo 15 yabonye iyi anorthosite ifite imyaka miliyari 4.1, imwe mu mabuye ya kera cyane yigeze gukusanywa. Yafashije kwemeza inyigisho y'inyanja ya magma ku byerekeye iremwa ry'Ukwezi.
kirundi.the_moon_is_about_384_400_km_away_ligh: Ukwezi kuri hafi km 384,400 — urumuri rufata amasegonda 1.3 kugira ngo rugere yo!
kirundi.apollo_missions_took_about_3_days_each: Ubutumwa bwa Apollo bwafashe nk'iminsi 3 buri cyerekezo, bugenda ku muvuduko wa ~km 3,900/isaha.
kirundi.the_moon_s_gravity_is_1_6_of_earth_s_a: Imbaraga rukuruzi z'Ukwezi ni 1/6 by'Isi. Umuntu upima kg 70 apima ~kg 12 gusa aho!
kirundi.the_sunlit_side_reaches_127_c_while_th: Uruhande rumurikiwe n'izuba rugera kuri 127°C, mu gihe uruhande rwijimye rumanuka kugeza -173°C!
kirundi.12_astronauts_walked_on_the_moon_acros: Abahanga mu kirere 12 bagendeye ku Kwezi muri Apollo 11, 12, 14, 15, 16, na 17.
kirundi.buzz_aldrin_said_contact_light_first_b: Buzz Aldrin yavuze «Contact light» mbere, ariko interuro izwi cyane ya Armstrong yatangiranye na «That's».
kirundi.the_first_stage_burned_rp_1_kerosene_w: Icyiciro cya mbere cyatwitse kerosene RP-1 hamwe na oxygen y'amazi — toni zirenga 2,000 z'amavuta mu minota 2.5!
kirundi.sound_needs_a_medium_air_water_to_trav: Ijwi rikeneye umubyimba (umwuka/amazi) kugira ngo rigende. Ukwezi ntigufite ikirere, bityo gucecetse rwose.
kirundi.every_apollo_astronaut_reported_that_m: Buri muhanga mu kirere wa Apollo yatangaje ko umukungugu w'ukwezi unuka nk'ifu y'imbunda yatwitswe igihe bawuzanaga imbere ya LM!
kirundi.the_oldest_moon_rocks_are_4_4_billion_: Amabuye ya kera cyane y'ukwezi afite imyaka miliyari 4.4 — hafi ya kera nka Sisitemu y'Izuba!
kirundi.the_moon_is_about_384_400_km_away_ligh_2: Ukwezi kuri hafi km 384,400 — urumuri rufata amasegonda 1.3 kugira ngo rugere yo!
kirundi.rotate_spacecraft_to_expose_vent_to_su: Zunguza icyogajuru kugira ngo ushyire umwobo w'umwuka ku zuba
kirundi.reroute_cabin_heater_duct_to_warm_the_: Yobora bundi bushya umuyoboro w'ishyushya rya kabini kugira ngo ushyushye umuyoboro
kirundi.seal_the_vent_and_use_backup_waste_bag: Funga umwobo w'umwuka maze ukoreshe imifuka y'imyanda y'inyongera
kirundi.abort_the_descent_fire_ascent_engine: Hagarika kumanuka — gukongeza moteri yo kuzamuka
kirundi.boulder_field_at_landing_site: Umurima w'amabuye manini ku kibanza cyo kugwa!
kirundi.take_manual_control_and_fly_past_the_b: Fata igenzura ry'intoki maze uguruke unyura ku mabuye
kirundi.abort_and_try_again_next_orbit: Hagarika maze ugerageze nanone mu ruziga rukurikira
kirundi.oxygen_tank_pressure_spike: Kwiyongera kw'Umuvuduko wa Tank ya Oxygen
kirundi.immediately_isolate_tank_2_and_switch_: Tandukanya ako kanya tank 2 maze uhindukire kuri tank 1
kirundi.vent_tank_2_to_relieve_pressure: Sohora umwuka wa tank 2 kugira ngo ugabanye umuvuduko
kirundi.try_to_reset_the_tank_heater_circuit: Gerageza gusubiramo uruziga rw'ishyushya rya tank
kirundi.administer_anti_nausea_medication_and_: Tanga umuti urwanya iseseme n'igihe cyo kuruhuka
kirundi.tough_it_out_keep_working_through_the_: Ihangane — komeza gukora nubwo hari iseseme
kirundi.reduce_visual_stimulation_and_close_wi: Gabanya gukangura kwerekana maze ufunge amarido y'idirishya
kirundi.guided_experience_auto_landing_extende: Uburambe buyobowe — kugwa kwikora, O₂ yongerewe
kirundi.realistic_tight_fuel_budget_faster_o_d: Nyabyo — ingengo y'amavuta ifunganye, ikoreshwa ryihuse rya O₂
kirundi.complete_your_first_eva_moonwalk: Soza urugendo rwawe rwa mbere rw'ukwezi rwa EVA
kirundi.complete_mission_on_commander_difficul: Soza ubutumwa ku rwego rugoye rw'Umuyobozi
kirundi.full_mission_simulation_launch_to_spla: Igerageza ry'ubutumwa bwuzuye • Kohereza kugeza kumanuka mu mazi
kirundi.apollo_style_lunar_landing_mission: Ubutumwa bwo kugwa ku kwezi bw'uburyo bwa Apollo
kirundi.animated_saturn_v_rocket_launch_sequen: Urutonde rwo kohereza roketi Saturn V rufite imikorere. Kubara hasi kw'amasegonda 5 bikurikirwa no kuzamuka binyuze mu kirere bigana ku ruziga. Yerekana uburebure, umuvuduko, imbaraga za G, n'itandukana ry'ibyiciro.
kirundi.saturn_v_3_stages_7_5_million_lbs_thru: 🚀 Saturn V • Ibyiciro 3 • Imbaraga lbs miliyoni 7.5
kirundi.watch_the_countdown_and_ascent_through: Reba kubara hasi no kuzamuka binyuze mu kirere cy'Isi
kirundi.proceed_to_earth_orbit_phase_after_suc: Komeza ku cyiciro cy'uruziga rw'Isi nyuma yo kohereza byagenze neza
kirundi.animated_view_of_spacecraft_in_low_ear: Ireberwa rifite imikorere ry'icyogajuru mu ruziga rw'Isi rwo hasi kuri kilometero 185. CSM isoza uruziga 1.5 mu gihe idirishya ry'ukongeza rya Trans-Lunar Injection rihuza n'aho Ukwezi kuzaba. Ibara ry'uruziga, uburebure, umuvuduko, no kwitegura kwa TLI biragaragara.
kirundi.altitude_185_km_speed_28_000_km_h_1_5_: Uburebure: km 185 • Umuvuduko: km 28,000/isaha • Uruziga 1.5 mbere yo kongeza TLI
kirundi.the_s_ivb_third_stage_will_fire_for_5_: Icyiciro cya gatatu S-IVB kizatwika iminota 5 amasegonda 47 kugira ngo cyongere umuvuduko uva kuri km 28,000/isaha ujye kuri km 38,900/isaha — umuvuduko wo guhunga. Iri tswika rimwe rikohereza ku nzira igana Ukwezi kuri km 384,400.
kirundi.execute_trans_lunar_injection_burn_to_: Kora itwika rya Trans-Lunar Injection kugira ngo utangire urugendo rw'iminsi 3 rugana Ukwezi
kirundi.execute_tli_burn_head_to_the_moon: 🚀 Kora Itwika rya TLI — Jya ku Kwezi
kirundi.animated_trans_lunar_coast_earth_shrin: Urugendo rwa Trans-Lunar rufite imikorere. Isi igabanuka iburyo bw'ibumoso mu gihe Ukwezi kwiyongera iburyo igihe icyogajuru kigenda kilometero 384,400 mu minsi 3. Yerekana ibara ry'intera n'ibiganiro by'ubutumwa.
kirundi.arrive_at_the_moon_and_enter_lunar_orb: Gera ku Kwezi maze winjire mu ruziga rw'ukwezi ku burebure bwa kilometero 110
kirundi.arrive_at_the_moon_enter_lunar_orbit: 🌕 Gera ku Kwezi — Injira mu Ruziga rw'Ukwezi
kirundi.animated_view_of_spacecraft_orbiting_t: Ireberwa rifite imikorere ry'icyogajuru kizenguruka Ukwezi ku burebure bwa kilometero 110. Yerekana ubuso bw'ukwezi bufite ibyobo, ikibanza cyo kugwa cy'Inyanja y'Amahoro cyaranzwe ku rangi ry'icyatsi, n'akadomo k'icyogajuru kizenguruka.
kirundi.undock_lunar_module_eagle_from_command: Tandukanya module y'ukwezi Eagle na module y'amategeko Columbia maze utangire kumanuka ku mbaraga ugana ku buso bw'ukwezi
kirundi.undock_begin_powered_descent: ⬇️ Tandukanya maze Utangire Kumanuka ku Mbaraga
kirundi.start_slowing_down_early_moon_gravity_: Tangira kugabanya umuvuduko hakiri kare — imbaraga rukuruzi z'Ukwezi zoroshye ariko nta mbabazi
kirundi.watch_your_fuel_gauge_you_can_t_thrust: Reba ikipimo cy'amavuta yawe — ntushobora gusunika udafite amavuta!
kirundi.reduce_horizontal_speed_before_focusin: Gabanya umuvuduko utambitse mbere yo kwibanda ku uhagaze
kirundi.the_real_apollo_11_landed_with_only_25: Apollo 11 nyayo yagwa ifite amasegonda 25 gusa y'amavuta yasigaye!
kirundi.interactive_lunar_descent_piloting_gam: Umukino wo kuyobora kumanuka ku kwezi ukorana. Koresha W cyangwa akambi ko hejuru ku mbaraga, A na D cyangwa udukambi tw'ibumoso n'iburyo ku kwimuka ku ruhande. Gwa ufite umuvuduko uhagaze munsi ya metero 3 kuri segonda n'umuvuduko utambitse munsi ya metero 5 kuri segonda.
kirundi.begin_extravehicular_activity_moonwalk: Tangira igikorwa cyo hanze y'ikinyabiziga (kugenda ku kwezi) kugira ngo ushakashake ku buso bw'ukwezi maze ukusanye ingero z'ubumenyi bw'isi
kirundi.collect_rock_at_your_feet: Kusanya urutare ruri ku birenge byawe
kirundi.look_around_click_canvas_first: Reba hirya no hino (banza ukande kuri canvas)
kirundi.collect_at_least_4_unique_rock_samples: Kusanya nibura ingero 4 zihariye z'amabuye kugira ngo usohoze intego y'ubumenyi bw'isi.
kirundi.apollo_11_brought_back_47_5_lb_of_luna: Apollo 11 yagaruye lb 47.5 z'ingero z'ukwezi; Apollo 17 yazanye lb 243.
kirundi.in_one_sixth_gravity_a_hop_covers_abou: Mu mbaraga rukuruzi za kimwe cya gatandatu, gusimbuka bituma hatererwa hafi inshuro esheshatu z'intera itambitse ku mihati imwe.
kirundi.earth_hangs_in_a_fixed_spot_in_the_lun: Isi imanikwa ahantu hahoraho mu kirere cy'ukwezi kuko Ukwezi kuri mu kuzunguruka guhuje (gufunzwe n'umuraba).
kirundi.moonwalk_3d_mode_unresolved: Uburyo bwa 3D bwo Kugenda ku Kwezi Ntibwakemutse
kirundi.webgl_failed_to_initialize_your_browse: WebGL yananiwe gutangira. Mushakisha wawe cyangwa igikoresho cyawe gishobora kuba kidashyigikira ihutisha rya hardware ya 3D.
kirundi.interactive_3d_lunar_surface_eva_use_w: EVA ya 3D ikorana ku buso bw'ukwezi. Koresha WASD kugira ngo ugende, Space kugira ngo usimbuke mu mbaraga rukuruzi za kimwe cya gatandatu, F kugira ngo ukusanye ingero z'amabuye, n'imbeba kugira ngo urebe hirya no hino. Kusanya ingero z'ubumenyi bw'isi maze ushakashake ku buso bw'Ukwezi hafi ya module y'ukwezi.
kirundi.the_apollo_lunar_surface_experiments_p: Apollo Lunar Surface Experiments Package (ALSEP) yakoze imyaka nyuma y'uko abahanga mu kirere bagiye. Igipimo cy'umutingito cyamenye imitingito y'ukwezi n'ingaruka za meteorite kugeza 1977.
kirundi.the_lunar_roving_vehicle_cost_38_milli: Lunar Roving Vehicle yatwaye amadolari miliyoni 38. Imodoka ya Apollo 17 yagenze km 35.7 — iracyahagaze ku Kwezi ifite imfunguzo!
kirundi.the_flags_on_the_moon_have_been_bleach: Amabendera ari ku Kwezi yahindutse umweru usukuye kubera imyaka mirongo y'imirasire ya UV itamuriwe. Ibendera rya Apollo 12 ryonyine ni ryo umwotsi wa moteri washenye.
kirundi.lunar_seismometers_detected_deep_moonq: Ibipimo by'umutingito by'ukwezi byamenye imitingito y'ukwezi ikomeye yatewe n'imbaraga z'umuraba w'Isi ku burebure bwa km 700-1100. Ukwezi kuracyafite intima yashongeshejwe igice!
kirundi.scientists_bounce_lasers_off_this_mirr: Abahanga basubiza lazeri ku ndorerwamo iyi kugira ngo bapime intera y'Isi-Ukwezi ku kunyura kwa cm 1. Ukwezi kwimuka cm 3.8 kuva ku Isi buri mwaka.
kirundi.explore_collect_samples_jump_in_1_6_gr: Shakashaka • Kusanya ingero • Simbuka mu mbaraga rukuruzi 1/6!
kirundi.animated_lunar_ascent_sequence_ascent_: Urutonde rwo kuzamuka kw'ukwezi rufite imikorere. Icyiciro cyo kuzamuka kiguruka kiva ku Kwezi gisiga icyiciro cyo kumanuka inyuma, kizamuka kigana uruziga rw'ukwezi hejuru ya kilometero 60, hanyuma kigakora guhura-guhuza na module y'amategeko Columbia izenguruka. HUD yerekana uburebure, icyiciro, n'intera igana CSM.
kirundi.ascent_stage_launches_from_moon_docks_: Icyiciro cyo kuzamuka kiguruka kiva ku Kwezi kandi gihuzwa na Columbia
kirundi.the_lm_s_ascent_engine_a_single_start_: Moteri yo kuzamuka ya LM — moteri ya hypergolic yo gutangira rimwe idafite uburyo bwo guhagarika — itwika kugira ngo ikohereze uva ku buso bw'ukwezi. Icyiciro cyo kumanuka gikora nk'ikibanza cyo kohereza kandi gisigara inyuma. Uhura kandi uhuzwa na Columbia, hanyuma ujugunya «Eagle» (iyo amaherezo igwa ku Kwezi).
kirundi.fire_trans_earth_injection_burn_to_beg: Twika itwika rya Trans-Earth Injection kugira ngo utangire urugendo rw'iminsi 3 rwo gusubira mu rugo
kirundi.tei_burn_head_home: 🚀 Itwika rya TEI — Jya mu Rugo
kirundi.the_service_module_engine_fires_for_th: Moteri ya module ya serivisi itwika kuri Trans-Earth Injection. Ureremba ujya ku Isi mu minsi 3, ujugunya module ya serivisi, maze utegure module y'amategeko ku kongera kwinjira — icyiciro giteye akaga cyane cy'ubutumwa.
kirundi.begin_atmospheric_re_entry_sequence_at: Tangira urutonde rwo kongera kwinjira mu kirere kuri kilometero 39,900 ku isaha
kirundi.animated_re_entry_sequence_command_mod: Urutonde rwo kongera kwinjira rufite imikorere. Module y'amategeko yinjira mu kirere kuri km 39,900/isaha hamwe n'ubushyuhe bwa plasma bugera kuri dogere 2,760. Yerekana ihagarara ry'amaradiyo, parashuti zo mbere, parashuti nkuru, no kumanuka mu mazi y'inyanja.
kirundi.watch_the_command_module_survive_re_en: Reba module y'amategeko irokoka kongera kwinjira inyuze muri plasma ya 2,760°C kuri km 39,900/isaha, ifungura parashuti, kandi imanuka mu Nyanja ya Pasifika.
kirundi.complete_the_mission_with_pacific_ocea: Soza ubutumwa wamanuka mu mazi y'Inyanja ya Pasifika. Murakaza neza mu rugo, Muyobozi!
kirundi.welcome_home_commander_the_world_celeb: Murakaza neza mu rugo, Muyobozi. Isi irizihiza.
kirundi.these_samples_will_be_studied_by_scien: Izi ngero zizigwa n'abahanga mu myaka mirongo iri imbere.
kirundi.reset_and_start_a_new_moon_mission_fro: Subiramo maze utangire ubutumwa bushya bw'ukwezi uhereye ku ntangiriro
kirundi.tsiolkovsky_rocket_equation_adjust_mas: Ingingo ya roketi ya Tsiolkovsky. Hindura igipimo cy'ubwinshi, igihe cyo gutwika, n'imbaraga zihariye (Isp). Igisubizo gitandukanye cy'imimerere 3 cyerekana niba delta-V yawe idahagije, igera kuri LEO, cyangwa ihunga Isi. Nta manota, nta gushyira ahagaragara.
kirundi.hypothesis_free_text_no_right_answer_w: Igitekerezo (umwandiko wisanzuye — nta gisubizo cyiza): Ni iyihe nkoni y'ingenzi cyane?
kirundi.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Fata uduce tubiri twa sliders ushimangiye. Wimure kamwe. Reba.
kirundi.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_o: Shaka amagenamiterere abiri atanga igisubizo kimwe.
kirundi.which_slider_affects_v_the_most_use_th: Ni iyihe slider igira ingaruka kuri Δv cyane? Koresha inyandiko.
kirundi.real_spacecraft_trade_fuel_mass_agains: Icyogajuru nyacyo cyimuranya ubwinshi bw'amavuta na Isp. Shakashaka impamvu.
kirundi.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_mass_: Sobanura mu magambo yawe bwite: ese igipimo cy'ubwinshi, igihe cyo gutwika, na Isp bikorana bite?
kirundi.design_note_discrete_3_state_outcome_n: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: igisubizo gitandukanye cy'imimerere 3; nta manota; nta gushyira ahagaragara — ku bushake.
